step_rationale: Mast-cell protease; extracellular-matrix degradation and fibrous-cap remodeling.
mechanism: Chymase from activated mast cells degrades fibrous-cap matrix proteins, contributing to cap thinning and rupture in destabilizing plaques.

references.title: Proteomic profiling of extracellular vesicles reveals additional diagnostic biomarkers for myocardial infarction compared to plasma alone.
Desquamation of human coronary artery endothelium by human mast cell proteases: implications for plaque erosion.
